items.title: NASA's Curiosity Rover found promising organic chemicals on Mars

items.title: A look at Tim Cook’s 15-year legacy as CEO of Apple
items.summary: Cook, who joined Apple in 1998, succeeded Steve Jobs as CEO in 2011 and went on to transform Apple into a $4 trillion powerhouse.

items.title: Tim Cook's Legacy Is Turning Apple Into a Subscription
items.summary: The soon-to-exit Apple CEO went all in on services. Now, the incoming CEO, John Ternus, will need to embrace the AI era.
